title: Phase 0.3P: First Real Product Task Through E2E Loop
owner_goal: Prove that AI Dev Factory can complete one small, real, product-facing task through the existing E2E dev pipeline.
selected_product_task: Create a read-only product capability page/document describing how AI Dev Factory can accept a small product task and route it through safe E2E execution.
safety_rules: Do not read, write, print, or modify secrets or API keys
Do not perform destructive database actions
Do not spend money or trigger paid infra/ads
definition_of_done: Mission configuration file is created and valid JSON
Product capability document is created and populated with useful operator guidelines
Self-test gate supports 0.3p phase and executes successfully
Draft PR opens successfully on GitHub fork
merge_policy: Explicit owner approval required. Merge is blocked without OWNER_APPROVED_MERGE_PR approval token matching the target PR.
explanation: scripts/ai-dev-factory-pr-automation.mjs is modified solely to add PR automation metadata and description templates for Phase 0.3P.
